description: Letter from Yaʿaqov b. Ismail al-Andalusi, in Sicily, to Yoshua b. Natan al-Andalusi, in Fustat. Dealing with business matters and listing prices of goods in Sicily. Dated ca. 1050 (Gil's dating). (Information from Ben-Sasson, and from Gil)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
